    "System successfully evacuated below 500 microns",
    "Standing decay test passed with a rise of only 20 microns over 10 minutes, indicating a tight and dry system"

    "Proceed to charge the system with refrigerant"

  "rationale": "The system was isolated at 345 microns and rose to only 365 microns after 10 minutes. This minimal rise of 20 microns (well below the standard 500-micron threshold and typical allowable rise limits) confirms there are no leaks and no remaining moisture in the system.",
